author: €wan
title: App to Apple Watch?
content: Terrific app but is it not possible to create an app for the Apple Watch?

author: Algerienesse
title: Crashes alot
content: I have over 12000 songs locally on my phone and when adding them to the app it crashes. Same when I search för songs in the list

author: Nottakennick185
title: Very unintuitive
content: Adding new mp3 files and finding the old ones is incredibly unintuitive.

author: Pällas
title: Great app
content: Would give five star if it would come an app on apple watch

author: HannaPi
title: Latest update can’t play offline
content: It’s been a great app but after the latest update it’s not possible to play offline. I’ve been asking for support but I don’t get any respond.

author: Annahojagram
title: Försämring
content:
Appen har försämrats. 
Tidigare kunde man ändra ordning på låtarna med ett enkelt tryck . Nu har den funktionen plötsligt försvunnit. Varför?!!

author: john von beckhydda
title: Can it run spotify?
content: Can you download Spotify? playlists if so how.

author: Muhammed.Akd
title: Top
content: Best Music app ever just download it and put in the file and it will automaticly show up in the app when u get in to the files from the app nice thing to hold the play button and it will start where you leave the music very nice super happy similat to samsung music

author: Majsmannem
title: One of the best streaming players
content: Give me a categorisation by year and you will get 5 stars!

author: Elaka Arne
title: No seamless playback
content: Yet another app that can’t handle seamless playback with tracks that play into each other. They try to solve it with crossfades but that does not work properly. Perhaps it’s a nice app otherwise bit no seamless = no no for me. Uninstalling.

author: Ian_ :)
title: Perfect
content: It’s perfect. Literally no problem at all

author: AmeliaReviewing
title: Okay
content:
- Crashes from time to time when browsing smb share.
- Does not support ogg format.
- Album art download only works for about 20% of my albums.
- Adding an artist to queue can not sort albums by track nr, very annoying. Have to add one album at a time

author: Alexander Smoljanovic
title: Works better than the others
content:
First cloud player that actually works with my cloud accounts.

Paid the 30 kr since I liked what was available.

author: Lemure Lemur
title: Great player for Dropbox
content: Great for playing music from my Dropbox!

author: Grus333
title: iTunes killer
content: Riktigt bra app, skönt att slippa iTunes.

author: jdbcastrence
title: Awesome!
content: Clean and functional, please add support for playing music from the ipod library too.
